$comment: Canonical spacing/clickability source of truth for QuoteFleet. Mirrors WeFixTrades. See design-guardrails spec (2026-07-10). The --space-* CSS custom properties in src/server/public/style.css and widget-style.css are generated from these numbers; keep them in sync. The 8px-grid ramp below is the ONLY allowed set of spacing values — anything off it (7,9,10,11,13,14,18,22,26,28,...) is a guard violation (scripts/check-spacing.mjs).

clickability.dense-grid-exemption: rate-card / in-cell grids may render < 44px but MUST hold the >=24px floor and >=8px gaps
